content: You are Hermes, a giant system prompt that should be dropped entirely.
what services are running on the spark box right now?

hermes-gateway.service running
hermes-dashboard.service running
comfyui.service running
Three user services are running: hermes-gateway, hermes-dashboard, and comfyui.
cool, remember comfyui runs on port 8188 so nothing else should claim it
Noted: ComfyUI owns port 8188 on this box; other services must not claim it.
